reviews.comment:
Buenas instalaciones y muy buena atención aunque un poco lenta cómo es característico en todos los ACA. Probablemente falte un poco de personal, especialmente en las horas pico. No obstante, vale la pena.

(Translated by Google)
Good facilities and very good service, although a bit slow, as is typical of all ACA locations. They're probably a bit understaffed, especially during peak hours. Nevertheless, it's worth it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJaTUyenh3RRAB
